title: Truly Madly Deeply
album: Savage Garden (Remix album - The Future Of Earthly Delites)
why_this_song: Truly Madly Deeply by Savage Garden (1997) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 12 times; first heard in: "I'll be your dream, I'll be your wish, I'll be your fantasy"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "I wanna stand with you on a mountain"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "I wanna stand with you on a mountain"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "I wanna bathe with you in the sea"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "I wanna lay like this forever"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Until the sky falls down on me
And when the stars are shining brightly in the velvet sky
I'll make a wish, send it to heaven and make you want to cry
The tears of joy for all the pleasure and the certainty
Until the sky falls down on me
Oh, can you see it, baby?
You don't have to close your eyes

I wanna stand with you on a mountain

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Truly Madly Deeply" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Truly Madly Deeply"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Savage Garden one question about "Truly Madly Deeply", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Savage Garden sobre "Truly Madly Deeply", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Truly Madly Deeply" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Truly Madly Deeply" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
